text: Linda is a Business Class passenger flying from Charlotte to Phoenix with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 13 x 6 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 41 x 20 x 16 inches, 95 lbs; 3. A backpack: 38 x 24 x 18 inches, 74 lbs; 4. A backpack: 37 x 16 x 10 inches, 54 lbs; 5. A backpack: 43 x 25 x 20 inches, 52 lbs; Linda's flight ticket is $186.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1166"]).
/* =================  Facts describing Linda’s trip  ================= */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(186).

/* checked luggage:  bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(2,41,20,16,95).
bag(3,38,24,18,74).
bag(4,37,16,10,54).
bag(5,43,25,20,52).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids (carry-on isn’t listed) */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* =================  Statutory rules for this itinerary  ============= */

/* sum of the 3 dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – travel within / between U.S. / Canada / PR / USVI */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee – within / between U.S. / Canada / PR / USVI       */
/* complimentary bags: 70-lb limit; charged bags: 50-lb limit        */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for a bag = higher of oversize vs overweight fee */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),           % complimentary ⇒ 70-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),           % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fee by ordinal position for Business Class, domestic */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* =================  Helper predicates  ============================= */

/* choose 2 distinct elements (F1 < F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* build the ordered list: freebies occupy positions 1 and 2 */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,R1),
       select(F2,R1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* compute cost for a particular choice of complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagBaseFees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + BagBaseFees + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating base fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Base),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx + 1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,RestBase,RestPen),
       FeeSum is Base + RestBase,
       PenSum  is Pen  + RestPen.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of selecting 2 complimentary bags */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(Total,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* =================  Query and output  ============================== */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Jessica is a First Class passenger flying from Las Vegas to Philadelphia with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 11 x 8 inches, 6 lbs; 2. A backpack: 35 x 15 x 14 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 35 x 22 x 10 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A backpack: 41 x 19 x 18 inches, 86 lbs; 5. A backpack: 38 x 14 x 11 inches, 69 lbs; Jessica's flight ticket is $139.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 949"]).
/* =================  Facts describing Jessica’s trip  ================= */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(139).

/* list of checked bags:  bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(2,35,15,14,51).
bag(3,35,22,10,52).
bag(4,41,19,18,86).
bag(5,38,14,11,69).

/* list (constant) of all checked-bag Ids */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).


/* =================  Statutory rules for this itinerary  =============== */

/* sum of dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fees – within / between U.S. and Canada */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (  Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
       ;  Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
       ;  Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fees – complimentary bags use a 70-lb limit,
   charged bags use a 50-lb limit                                   */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (  W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
       ;  W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
       ;  W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
       ;  W =< 100    -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for a bag: the higher of oversize vs. overweight fee */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),       % complimentary ⇒ 70-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),       % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fees for First Class on this route */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.


/* =================  Helper predicates  ================================ */

/* choose two different elements (F1<F2 with respect to the list order) */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* build an ordered list with the 2 complimentary bags first */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* cost for a particular choice of complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagFees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + BagFees + Penalties.

/* walk through the bag list accumulating fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of selecting 2 complimentary bags */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).


/* =================  Query and output  ================================ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).

text: Elizabeth is a First Class passenger flying from Austin to Mumbai with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 14 x 6 inches, 12 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 33 x 23 x 9 inches, 56 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 49 x 27 x 20 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A backpack: 37 x 17 x 10 inches, 58 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 50 x 35 x 30 inches, 53 lbs; Elizabeth's flight ticket is $471.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1131"]).
/* =========================================================
   Facts describing Elizabeth’s itinerary and luggage
   ========================================================= */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(471).

/* checked bags:  bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(2,33,23, 9,56).
bag(3,49,27,20,52).
bag(4,37,17,10,58).
bag(5,50,35,30,53).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* =========================================================
   Statutory rules for travel between the U.S. and India
   (First Class)
   ========================================================= */

/* sum of the 3 dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Over-SIZE fees   (China / Japan / S. Korea / HK / India /
                     Australia / New Zealand region)
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
      (  Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0          % not oversize
      ;  Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30         % 62–65 in
      ;  Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200        % 65–115 in
      ).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Over-WEIGHT fees
   Two different free allowances apply:
        • complimentary bag ⇒ 70-lb threshold
        • charged bag       ⇒ 50-lb threshold
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
      (  W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
      ;  W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
      ;  W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
      ;  W =< 100       -> Fee = 450        % 70–100 lb  (India region)
      ).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Penalty for a bag = higher of its oversize vs overweight
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,WT),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
      oversize_fee(S,OS),
      overweight_fee(WT,70,OW),             % complimentary
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,WT),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
      oversize_fee(S,OS),
      overweight_fee(WT,50,OW),             % charged
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ---------------------------------------------------------
   Base checked-bag fee (First Class, U.S.–India):
        ‑ 1st, 2nd, 3rd bags: $0
        ‑ 4th bag and beyond : $200
   --------------------------------------------------------- */
bag_base_fee(N,Fee) :-
      (  N =< 3   -> Fee = 0
      ;  N >= 4   -> Fee = 200 ).

/* =========================================================
   Helper predicates
   ========================================================= */

/* choose exactly 1 bag that will become the (charged) 4th bag */
choose_one(List,Chosen) :- member(Chosen,List).

/* build the ordered list: complimentary bags first, charged bag last */
ordered_list(Charged,Ordered) :-
      checked_bag_ids(All),
      select(Charged,All,Complimentary),
      append(Complimentary,[Charged],Ordered).

/* walk the ordered list, accumulating base fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Rest],Idx,TotalCost) :-
      ( Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged ),
      bag_base_fee(Idx,Base),
      penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
      NextIdx is Idx + 1,
      cost_bags(Rest,NextIdx,RestCost),
      TotalCost is Base + Pen + RestCost.

/* total cost for a particular choice of charged bag */
cost_for_choice(Charged,Total) :-
      ordered_list(Charged,Ordered),
      cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagCost),
      flight_cost(Tix),
      Total is Tix + BagCost.

/* compute the minimal total cost over all possible choices */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
      checked_bag_ids(L),
      findall(T, (choose_one(L,Ch), cost_for_choice(Ch,T)), Totals),
      min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* =========================================================
   Query and output
   ========================================================= */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Robert is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from Minneapolis to New York with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 11 x 8 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A backpack: 36 x 16 x 11 inches, 53 lbs; 3. A backpack: 38 x 22 x 13 inches, 74 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 42 x 21 x 15 inches, 51 lbs; 5. A backpack: 36 x 22 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; Robert's flight ticket is $178.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1203"]).
/* =========================================================
   Statutory rules and facts for Robert’s itinerary
   ========================================================= */

/* ----------------  Carry-on limits  ---------------------- */
carry_on_max(22,14,9).          % length, width, height (inches)

/* ----------------  Checked-bag fees (Main Plus) ---------- */
/* Main Plus = Main Cabin allowance + 1 complimentary bag
   (domestic U.S. route; max 2 checked-bag allowance).       */
checked_fee(1, 0).              % 1st checked bag is free
checked_fee(2, 45).             % 2nd checked bag
checked_fee(3,150).             % 3rd checked bag
checked_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.     % 4th bag and beyond

/* ----------------  Extra fees – size --------------------- */
/* Route: within / between U.S. & Canada / PR / USVI         */
oversize_fee(Dim,30)  :- Dim>62 , Dim=<65.
oversize_fee(Dim,200) :- Dim>65 , Dim=<115.
oversize_fee(Dim,0)   :- Dim=<62.

/* ----------------  Extra fees – weight ------------------- */
overweight_fee(W,30)   :- W>50 , W=<53.
overweight_fee(W,100)  :- W>53 , W=<70.
overweight_fee(W,200)  :- W>70 , W=<100.
overweight_fee(W,0)    :- W=<50.

/* ----------------  Extra fee chooser --------------------- */
/* “The higher fee between oversize and overweight applies,
   in addition to the checked-bag fee.”                      */
extra_fee(Dim,W,Fee) :-
        oversize_fee(Dim,OS),
        overweight_fee(W,OW),
        (OS>=OW -> Fee = OS ; Fee = OW).

/* ----------------  Trip facts ---------------------------- */
flight_ticket(178).
route(domestic).                % Minneapolis → New York inside U.S.

/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(1,18,11, 8,  7).     % personal item / carry-on
bag(2,36,16,11, 53).
bag(3,38,22,13, 74).
bag(4,42,21,15, 51).
bag(5,36,22,11, 52).

/* ----------------  Helper predicates --------------------- */

/* sum of the three dimensions */
dim_sum(Id,S) :- bag(Id,L,W,H,_), S is L+W+H.

/* true if a bag fits the carry-on size limits               */
carry_on(Id) :-
        bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
        carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
        L=<MaxL, W=<MaxW, H=<MaxH.

/* Determine ordinal number (N) of a checked bag, skipping
   the single carry-on / personal item                       */
checked_bag_number(Id,N) :-
        findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), List),
        nth1(N,List,Id).

/* Cost for one checked bag (base fee + highest extra fee)   */
bag_total_fee(Id,Total) :-
        checked_bag_number(Id,N),
        checked_fee(N,Base),
        dim_sum(Id,Dim),
        bag(Id,_,_,_,W),
        extra_fee(Dim,W,Extra),
        Total is Base + Extra.

/* Sum of all checked-bag fees                               */
total_checked_bag_fees(Sum) :-
        findall(F, bag_total_fee(_,F), Fs),
        sum_list(Fs,Sum).

/* ----------------  Grand total --------------------------- */
total_cost(Total) :-
        flight_ticket(Tix),
        total_checked_bag_fees(Bags),
        Total is Tix + Bags.

/* ----------------  Query & output ------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

text: Michael is a Business Class passenger flying from Toronto to Philadelphia with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 14 x 7 inches, 10 lbs; 2. A backpack: 34 x 20 x 11 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A backpack: 48 x 36 x 24 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 34 x 21 x 9 inches, 68 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 35 x 14 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; Michael's flight ticket is $352.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 992"]).
/* =========================================================
   Michael – Business Class
   Toronto (Canada)  →  Philadelphia (U.S.)
   Route category: Within / between U.S. and Canada
   ========================================================= */

/* ---------------  Ticket price  ------------------------- */
flight_cost(352).

/* ---------------  Carry-on item (free) ------------------ */
/* Bag #1 (21×14×7, 10 lbs) fits the carry-on limits, so it
   is NOT included in the checked-bag list.                 */

/* ---------------  Checked bags  ------------------------- */
/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)                      */
bag(2,34,20,11,51).
bag(3,48,36,24,51).
bag(4,34,21, 9,68).
bag(5,35,14,14,52).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids (in no particular order)    */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ---------------  Statutory rules  ---------------------- */

/* total (L+W+H) */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* Oversize fees – within / between U.S. & Canada */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
        (  Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
        ;  Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
        ;  Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 200).

/* Overweight fees – threshold depends on whether
   the bag’s BASE fee is complimentary (70 lbs) or charged (50 lbs). */
overweight_fee(Weight,Thresh,Fee) :-
        (  Weight =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
        ;  Weight =< 53     -> Fee = 30
        ;  Weight =< 70     -> Fee = 100
        ;  Weight =< 100    -> Fee = 200).

/* Penalty = higher of the oversize vs. overweight fee */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-           % complimentary bag
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
        oversize_fee(S,OS),
        overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-        % charged bag
        bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
        oversize_fee(S,OS),
        overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* Base checked-bag fees for Business Class on this route */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ---------------  Helper predicates  -------------------- */

/* choose two different elements (F1 < F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
        append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
        member(F2,Tail).

/* build the ordered list of bags: freebies first          */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        select(F1,All,R1),
        select(F2,R1,R2),
        Ordered = [F1,F2|R2].

/* cost for one concrete choice of the 2 complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
        ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
        cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagCost,Penalties),
        flight_cost(Tix),
        Total is Tix + BagCost + Penalties.

/* walk through the ordered list accumulating base fees
   (BagCost) and penalties (Penalties)                     */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,BagSum,PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 2 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
        bag_fee(Idx,Base),
        penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
        Next is Idx+1,
        cost_bags(Bs,Next,BagRest,PenRest),
        BagSum is Base + BagRest,
        PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* ---------------  Overall minimal total cost ------------ */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(List),
        findall(T,
                ( choose_two(List,F1,F2),
                  cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
                Totals),
        min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ---------------  Query & result ------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Jessica is a Main Plus Class passenger flying from Seattle to Miami with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 12 x 7 inches, 5 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 51 x 29 x 24 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A backpack: 46 x 25 x 21 inches, 63 lbs; 4. A backpack: 47 x 35 x 24 inches, 75 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 34 x 22 x 9 inches, 53 lbs; Jessica's flight ticket is $292.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1317"]).
/*-----------------------------------------------------------
   American Airlines – baggage and ticket cost calculator
   Case:  Jessica – Seattle (SEA) ➔ Miami (MIA), Main Plus
-----------------------------------------------------------*/

/* ----------  ticket -------------------------------------- */
flight_cost(292).


/* ----------  list of checked bags  ----------------------- */
/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).                      */
/* (Jessica’s backpack that is 22x12x7, 5 lbs is her carry-on,
   therefore it is NOT listed here.)                        */
bag(2,51,29,24,51).
bag(3,46,25,21,63).
bag(4,47,35,24,75).
bag(5,34,22, 9,53).

/* list (constant) of all checked-bag Ids (order given) */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ----------  Statutory rules (domestic, Main Plus)  ------- */

/* sum of dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – Within / between U.S., Canada, PR, USVI */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee – domestic
   Threshold is 70 lbs for COMPLIMENTARY bags, 50 lbs for CHARGED */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for one bag: higher of over-size vs over-weight */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),   % complimentary ⇒ 70-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),   % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fee by ordinal position – Main Plus (domestic) */
bag_fee(1,0).                  % extra free bag that Main Plus includes
bag_fee(2,45).                 % 2nd checked bag
bag_fee(3,150).                % 3rd
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.        % 4th and beyond

/* ----------  Helper predicates --------------------------- */

/* choose exactly 1 element Free from the list */
choose_one([X|_],X).
choose_one([_|T],X) :- choose_one(T,X).

/* build ordered list putting Free first, others keep order */
ordered_list(Free,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(Free,All,Rest),
       Ordered = [Free|Rest].

/* compute cost for a particular choice of complimentary bag */
cost_for_choice(Free,Total) :-
       ordered_list(Free,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,CostBags,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + CostBags + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =:= 1 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of choosing the free bag */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_one(L,F),
                 cost_for_choice(F,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------  Query and report ---------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

text: David is a Business Class passenger flying from Portland to Orlando with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 14 x 8 inches, 9 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 36 x 16 x 13 inches, 58 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 36 x 16 x 13 inches, 51 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 45 x 30 x 20 inches, 98 lbs; 5. A backpack: 34 x 18 x 12 inches, 88 lbs; David's flight ticket is $207.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1017"]).
/* ===================================================================
   American Airlines bag-fee calculator
   Case: David – Business Class – Portland (PDX) ↔ Orlando (MCO)
   =================================================================== */


/* ----------  Ticket ------------------------------------------------ */

flight_cost(207).                 /* price of David’s ticket in $ */


/* ----------  Checked bags ----------------------------------------- */
/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */

bag(2,36,16,13,58).
bag(3,36,16,13,51).
bag(4,45,30,20,98).
bag(5,34,18,12,88).

/* list (constant) of all checked-bag Ids                             */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ----------  Statutory rules for this itinerary ------------------- */

/* sum of outside dimensions                                          */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ----------------------------------------------------  Oversize fee */
/* Route: within / between U.S. and Canada (includes PDX–MCO)         */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* ---------------------------------------------------  Overweight fee */
/* Different thresholds for complimentary vs. charged bags            */
/* (Business cabin: 70-lb allowance for complimentary bags)           */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100       -> Fee = 200 ).

/* --------------------------------------------------  Penalty (extra) */
/* “Higher of oversize vs. overweight”                                 */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-                    /* complimentary bag   */
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),          /* 70-lb threshold     */
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-                 /* excess-fee bag      */
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),          /* 50-lb threshold     */
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ----------------------------------------------  Checked-bag fees   */
/* Business Class – travel within U.S.                                 */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* ----------  Helper predicates ------------------------------------ */

/* choose two different elements (Id1<Id2) from a list                */
choose_two(List,Id1,Id2) :-
       append(_,[Id1|Tail],List),
       member(Id2,Tail).

/* build an ordered list whose first 2 positions are the freebies     */
ordered_list(Free1,Free2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(Free1,All,R1),
       select(Free2,R1,R2),
       Ordered = [Free1,Free2|R2].

/* walk through ordered list accumulating bag fees & penalties        */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx + 1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,FRest,PRest),
       FeeSum is Fee + FRest,
       PenSum is Pen + PRest.

/* compute total for a particular selection of the 2 complimentary bags */
choice_total(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,Fees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Tix),
       Total is Tix + Fees + Penalties.

/* minimal total over all ways of choosing the 2 freebies              */
total_cost(Min) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T, (choose_two(L,F1,F2), choice_total(F1,F2,T)), Ts),
       min_list(Ts,Min).

/* ----------  Query & output --------------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Susan is a Business Class passenger flying from Minneapolis to Miami with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 11 x 8 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A backpack: 44 x 32 x 20 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A backpack: 37 x 13 x 14 inches, 68 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 34 x 16 x 14 inches, 66 lbs; 5. A backpack: 49 x 32 x 23 inches, 96 lbs; Susan's flight ticket is $162.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 972"]).
/* =========================================
   Susan – Minneapolis (MSP) ➔ Miami (MIA)
   Business Class – domestic itinerary
   ========================================= */

/* ---------- ticket price ---------------- */
flight_cost(162).

/* ---------- checked bags ---------------- */
/* bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight)   */
bag(2, 44, 32, 20, 51).
bag(3, 37, 13, 14, 68).
bag(4, 34, 16, 14, 66).
bag(5, 49, 32, 23, 96).

/* list of *checked* bag Ids                */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ---------- statutory rules -------------- */

/* sum of the 3 outside dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – within / between U.S. & Canada */
oversize_fee(S,Fee) :-
         (   S =< 62  -> Fee = 0
         ;   S =< 65  -> Fee = 30
         ;   S =< 115 -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee – threshold = 70 lb for complimentary,
                      threshold = 50 lb for charged bags  */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
         (   W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
         ;   W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
         ;   W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
         ;   W =< 100    -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty = higher of oversize vs. overweight ------------- */
penalty(BagId,complimentary,Pen) :-
         bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
         dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
         oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
         overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),
         Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
         bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
         dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
         oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
         overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),
         Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* base checked–bag fees for Business Class, domestic */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ---------- helper predicates ------------- */

/* choose two distinct elements (F1 < F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
         append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
         member(F2,Tail).

/* place freebies first, preserve order of the others */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
         checked_bag_ids(All),
         select(F1,All,R1),
         select(F2,R1,R2),
         Ordered = [F1,F2|R2].

/* cost for one specific choice of the two complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
         ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
         cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagCost,Penalties),
         flight_cost(Flight),
         Total is Flight + BagCost + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating base fees & penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
         (Idx =< 2 -> Class = complimentary ; Class = charged),
         bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
         penalty(Bag,Class,Pen),
         NextIdx is Idx+1,
         cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,RestCost,RestPen),
         CostSum is BaseFee + RestCost,
         PenSum  is Pen + RestPen.

/* compute minimal total over every way of picking 2 freebies */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
         checked_bag_ids(L),
         findall(T,
                 ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                   cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T) ),
                 Totals),
         min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ---------- query & output ---------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

reference_prolog:

       (   Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 200).

/* overweight fee – threshold 70 lb for complimentary bags,
                     50 lb for charged bags                    */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100    -> Fee = 200).

/* penalty for a bag = higher of oversize vs overweight fee   */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-

       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),

/* checked-bag base fee for First Class on this route */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,150).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.

/* ----------  Helper predicates --------------------------- */

/* choose 2 different elements (F1<F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-

ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-

cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-

cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-

/* minimal total cost over all ways of selecting 2 freebies */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),

               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),

text: Elizabeth is a First Class passenger flying from Osaka to Houston with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 13 x 9 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A backpack: 33 x 18 x 14 inches, 69 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 38 x 19 x 18 inches, 71 lbs; 4. A backpack: 37 x 14 x 12 inches, 60 lbs; 5. A backpack: 33 x 16 x 14 inches, 58 lbs; Elizabeth's flight ticket is $503.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1243"]).
/* -------------  Facts for Elizabeth’s itinerary ------------------ */

/* ticket price */
flight_cost(503).

/* checked bags: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(2,33,18,14,69).
bag(3,38,19,18,71).
bag(4,37,14,12,60).
bag(5,33,16,14,58).

/* list of all checked-bag Ids */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).


/* -------------  Statutory rules for this route ------------------- */

/* sum of the 3 dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fees – to / from Japan, U.S. */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
      (  Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
      ;  Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
      ;  Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fees – to / from Japan, U.S.                         */
/* Threshold is 70 lb for complimentary bags, 50 lb for charged bags */
overweight_fee(Weight,Thresh,Fee) :-
      (  Weight =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
      ;  Weight =< 53     -> Fee = 30
      ;  Weight =< 70     -> Fee = 100
      ;  Weight =< 100    -> Fee = 450 ).

/* penalty on a bag = higher of oversize vs overweight fee */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
      oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
      overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),          % complimentary ⇒ 70-lb limit
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
      oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
      overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),          % charged bag ⇒ 50-lb limit
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* checked-bag base fee by ordinal position (First Class) */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.                   % 4th bag and beyond


/* -------------  Helper predicates -------------------------------- */

/* choose three different elements (F1<F2<F3) from a list */
choose_three(List,F1,F2,F3) :-
      append(_,[F1|T1],List),
      append(_,[F2|T2],T1),
      member(F3,T2).

/* freebies go in positions 1-3, the rest follow */
ordered_list(F1,F2,F3,Ordered) :-
      checked_bag_ids(All),
      select(F1,All,R1),
      select(F2,R1,R2),
      select(F3,R2,Rest),
      Ordered = [F1,F2,F3|Rest].

/* cost for a particular choice of the 3 complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,F3,Total) :-
      ordered_list(F1,F2,F3,Ordered),
      cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagFees,Penalties),
      flight_cost(Flight),
      Total is Flight + BagFees + Penalties.

/* walk through bag list collecting base fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
      (Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
      bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
      penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
      NextIdx is Idx + 1,
      cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,RestFees,RestPens),
      CostSum is Fee + RestFees,
      PenSum  is Pen + RestPens.

/* minimal total cost over all ways of selecting the 3 freebies */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
      checked_bag_ids(L),
      findall(T,(choose_three(L,F1,F2,F3),cost_for_choice(F1,F2,F3,T)),Totals),
      min_list(Totals,MinTotal).


/* -------------  Query and output --------------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

text: William is a Business Class passenger flying from New Orleans to New York with the following items: 1. A backpack: 21 x 11 x 6 inches, 10 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 33 x 18 x 12 inches, 65 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 33 x 19 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 34 x 20 x 11 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 33 x 16 x 14 inches, 66 lbs; William's flight ticket is $281.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 751"]).
/* ====================================================================
   William – Business Class – New Orleans  ➔  New York   (domestic)
   ==================================================================== */

/* ---------------  Ticket price  ------------------------------------ */
flight_cost(281).


/* ---------------  Checked bags (carry-on bag is not listed) -------- */
/*    bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight)                          */
bag(2,33,18,12,65).
bag(3,33,19,11,52).
bag(4,34,20,11,52).
bag(5,33,16,14,66).


/* ---------------  Ordered universe of checked-bag IDs -------------- */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ---------------  Statutory rules for this itinerary --------------- */

/* (1) Sum of dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* (2) Oversize fee – within / between U.S. and Canada */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* (3) Overweight fee – within / between U.S. and Canada             */
/*     Threshold is 70 lbs for the 1st-2nd complimentary bags,       */
/*     and 50 lbs for every subsequently CHARGED bag                 */
overweight_fee(W,Threshold,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Threshold  -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53         -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70         -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100        -> Fee = 200 ).

/* (4) Penalty for a bag = higher of oversize vs. overweight fee      */
penalty(BagId,complimentary,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* (5) Base checked-bag fee for Business Class on this route         */
bag_fee(1,0).              /* 1st bag (complimentary)  */
bag_fee(2,0).              /* 2nd bag (complimentary)  */
bag_fee(3,150).            /* 3rd bag                  */
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.    /* 4th bag and beyond       */

/* ---------------  Helper predicates  ------------------------------ */

/* Choose 2 different elements F1<F2 from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* Remove the chosen freebies & build the final ordered list          */
/* – freebies occupy positions 1 and 2                                */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* Cost for one specific choice of the 2 complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagCost,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Flight),
       Total is Flight + BagCost + Penalties.

/* Walk through the ordered list accumulating base fees & penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Type = complimentary ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* ---------------  Grand-total minimisation ------------------------ */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,(choose_two(L,F1,F2), cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

text: Patricia is a First Class passenger flying from Philadelphia to Paris with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 14 x 9 inches, 12 lbs; 2. A backpack: 35 x 18 x 10 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 41 x 20 x 14 inches, 53 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 16 x 9 inches, 52 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 36 x 17 x 12 inches, 59 lbs; Patricia's flight ticket is $255.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 695"]).
/* ===========================================================
   Patricia – Philadelphia (U.S.)  →  Paris (France)
   Cabin: First Class   –  Trans-Atlantic itinerary
   ===========================================================*/

/* ----------------  Ticket price  ---------------------------*/
flight_cost(255).

/* ----------------  Baggage data  ---------------------------*/
/* Bag facts: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).            */
/* Bag 1 is carry-on (22×14×9 / 12 lbs) and is therefore not */
/* included in the checked-bag list.                         */

bag(2,35,18,10,51).
bag(3,41,20,14,53).
bag(4,38,16, 9,52).
bag(5,36,17,12,59).

/* list of checked-bag Ids (all except the carry-on) */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).

/* ----------------  Statutory rules  -------------------------*/

/* ------ size: sum of the three outside dimensions ----------*/
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ------ oversize fees (Europe ↔ U.S.) ----------------------*/
/* 0 – 62 in ⇒ $0 | 62+ – 65 in ⇒ $30 | 65+ – 115 in ⇒ $150   */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
      (  Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
      ;  Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
      ;  Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 150).

/* ------ overweight fees ------------------------------------*/
/* Thresh is weight allowance (70 lbs for complimentary bags,
   50 lbs for charged bags).                                  */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
      (  W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
      ;  W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
      ;  W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
      ;  W =< 100       -> Fee = 200).

/* ------ penalty: higher of the two (size vs weight) --------*/
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
      oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
      overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),      % 70-lb limit for gratis bags
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
      bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
      dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
      oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
      overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),      % 50-lb limit for charged bags
      Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ------ base checked-bag fees for First Class --------------*/
/* 1st, 2nd, 3rd bags: $0   |   4th+ bags: $200               */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ----------------  Helper predicates  -----------------------*/

/* choose exactly 1 bag to be the “paid” 4th bag               */
choose_paid(List,Paid,Ordered) :-
        select(Paid,List,Freebies),          % remove Paid from List
        append(Freebies,[Paid],Ordered).     % freebies first, paid last

/* compute total cost for a particular choice of paid bag      */
cost_for_choice(Paid,Total) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        choose_paid(All,Paid,Ordered),
        cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagFees,Penalties),
        flight_cost(Flight),
        Total is Flight + BagFees + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list, accumulating fees & penalties    */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
        bag_fee(Idx,Fee),
        penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
        NextIdx is Idx + 1,
        cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
        CostSum is Fee + CostRest,
        PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

/* --------------  Grand-total (minimised)  -------------------*/
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(L),
        findall(T, (member(Paid,L), cost_for_choice(Paid,T)), Totals),
        min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* ----------------  Query & report  --------------------------*/
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

A luggage box: 34 x 22 x 9 inches, 54 lbs; 4. A backpack: 38 x 16 x 10 inches, 53 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 36 x 20 x 9 inches, 95 lbs; Karen's flight ticket is $181.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 991"]).
/* ================================================================== */
/*  Karen – Business Class – Miami (U.S.)  →  Montreal (Canada)       */
/*  Statutory calculation of the total trip cost                      */
/*  (2 complimentary checked bags for Business Class)                 */
/* ================================================================== */


/* -------------  Basic trip data  ---------------------------------- */

flight_cost(181).                     /* ticket price – USD */


/* list of checked bags:  bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)          */
/* (the small 18×12×7 in / 7-lb backpack is her free carry-on item)   */
bag(2,39,17,13,67).
bag(3,34,22, 9,54).
bag(4,38,16,10,53).
bag(5,36,20, 9,95).

checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5]).           /* only the bags that are checked */


/* -------------  Statutory fee schedules  -------------------------- */

/* sum of a bag’s outside dimensions */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* oversize fee – within / between the U.S. and Canada                */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight fee                                                     */
/*  – Thresh = 70 lb for complimentary bags (1st & 2nd)               */
/*  – Thresh = 50 lb for charged bags (3rd and after)                 */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty for a bag = higher of oversize vs. overweight              */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
       oversize_fee(S,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),           % complimentary threshold
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
       oversize_fee(S,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),           % charged-bag threshold
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* base checked-bag fee for Business Class on this route              */
bag_fee(1,0).          % 1st bag – free
bag_fee(2,0).          % 2nd bag – free
bag_fee(3,150).        % 3rd bag
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.% 4th bag and beyond


/* -------------  Minimisation routine ------------------------------ */

/* choose two different elements (F1 < F2) from a list                */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* place the 2 freebies first, keep remaining order for the rest      */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,R1),
       select(F2,R1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* cost for a particular choice of the 2 complimentary bags           */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,BagsCost,PenCost),
       flight_cost(Tix),
       Total is Tix + BagsCost + PenCost.

/* walk the ordered list calculating cumulative costs                 */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,Csum,Psum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
       penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
       Next is Idx + 1,
       cost_bags(Bs,Next,Crest,Prest),
       Csum is BaseFee + Crest,
       Psum is Pen + Prest.

/* minimal total over all possible ways to pick the 2 freebies        */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).


/* -------------  Final query / output ------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: Linda is a First Class passenger flying from Doha to Miami with the following items: 1. A backpack: 22 x 11 x 8 inches, 7 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 34 x 21 x 10 inches, 59 lbs; 3. A backpack: 51 x 31 x 30 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 44 x 23 x 19 inches, 70 lbs; 5. A backpack: 40 x 19 x 18 inches, 62 lbs; Linda's flight ticket is $1022.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1702"]).
/*************************************************************************
*  American Airlines bag-fee calculator                                  *
*  Case – Linda : Doha (Qatar)  ➜  Miami (U.S.) – First Class            *
*************************************************************************/

                    /* ----------  Flight data  ---------- */

flight_ticket(1022).                /* ticket price (USD) */
cabin(first).                       /* First Class */

route(qatar_us).                    /* “Between Qatar and U.S.” */

                    /* ----------  All bags carried  ------- */
/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) – dimensions in inches, weight in lbs */

bag(1,22,11, 8,  7).      /* small backpack – candidate carry-on           */
bag(2,34,21,10, 59).
bag(3,51,31,30, 52).
bag(4,44,23,19, 70).
bag(5,40,19,18, 62).

                    /* ----------  Carry-on rules  ---------- */

carry_on_max(22,14,9).              /* max L x W x H for a carry-on bag */

/* a bag qualifies as carry-on if all three dimensions are within limits */
carry_on(Id) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    L =< MaxL,  W =< MaxW,  H =< MaxH.

                    /* ----------  Checked-bag list ---------- */

/* list of the 4 checked bags (exclude the single carry-on) */
checked_bag_ids(Ids) :-
    findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), Ids).

                    /* ----------  Base checked-bag fees ---- */
/* ‘Between Qatar and U.S.’ – First Class
     • Bags 1-3 complimentary
     • Bag 4 and every bag after that: $200                          */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

                    /* ----------  Oversize fees ------------- */
/* all regions share the same inch-bands                            */
oversize_fee(DimSum,Fee) :-
       (   DimSum =< 62     -> Fee = 0
       ;   DimSum =< 65     -> Fee = 30
       ;   DimSum =< 115    -> Fee = 150).

                    /* ----------  Over-weight fees ---------- */
/* distinction: complimentary bags use a 70-lb limit, charged bags 50-lb */

overweight_fee(Weight,comp,Fee) :-           % complimentary bag
       (   Weight =< 70   -> Fee = 0
       ;   Weight =< 100  -> Fee = 200         % (>70–100)  – NOT accepted,
       ).                                       % but never reached in this case

overweight_fee(Weight,charged,Fee) :-        % charged bag
       (   Weight =< 50   -> Fee = 0
       ;   Weight =< 53   -> Fee = 30
       ;   Weight =< 70   -> Fee = 100
       ;   Weight =< 100  -> Fee = 200
       ).

                    /* ----------  Penalties ----------------- */
/* “The higher fee between oversize and overweight applies.”        */
penalty(Id,Type,Penalty) :-
       bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
       DimSum is L+W+H,
       oversize_fee(DimSum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,Type,OW),
       Penalty is max(OS,OW).

                    /* ----------  Ordering of bags ---------- */
/* Three bags are complimentary (positions 1-3), exactly **one** bag
   goes in position 4 (and therefore attracts both the $200 base fee
   and the ‘charged’ overweight schedule).

   We enumerate every way of choosing that single charged bag and pick
   the minimum total cost.                                           */

ordered_list(ChargedId,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(ChargedId,All,Complimentary),
       append(Complimentary,[ChargedId],Ordered).   % put charged bag last

                    /* ----------  Cost for a specific choice ----- */

cost_for_choice(ChargedId,Total) :-
       ordered_list(ChargedId,Ordered),
       cost_bags(Ordered,1,CostBags,Penalties),
       flight_ticket(Tix),
       Total is Tix + CostBags + Penalties.

/* walk the ordered list, accumulating base fees and penalties */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       NextIdx is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,NextIdx,CostRest,PenRest),
       CostSum is BaseFee + CostRest,
       PenSum  is Pen + PenRest.

                    /* ----------  Grand total -------------------- */

total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       findall(T, (member(Bag,All), cost_for_choice(Bag,T)), Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

                    /* ----------  Query & Output ----------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-

:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1349"]).

bag(2,36,18, 9, 53).

bag(5,37,14,12, 57).

/* ----------  Carry-on rules --------------------------------------- */
carry_on_max(22,14,9).

carry_on(Id) :-
        bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
        carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
        L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH.

/* ----------  Helper: list of checked bags ------------------------- */
checked_bag_ids(List) :-
        findall(Id,(bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id)),List).
/* For John: List = [2,3,4,5]                                         */

/* ----------  Geometry & Weight helpers ---------------------------- */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* ----------  Oversize fees (U.S. ↔ Europe) ------------------------ */
/* 62 in or less  → $0
   62–65 in       → $30
   65–115 in      → $150                                              */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
        (  Sum =< 62  -> Fee = 0
        ;  Sum =< 65  -> Fee = 30
        ;  Sum =< 115 -> Fee = 150).

/* ----------  Overweight fees (U.S. ↔ Europe) ---------------------- */
/* ‘Thresh’ is the free allowance (70 lb for complimentary bags,
                                    50 lb for charged bags)          */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
        (  W =< Thresh -> Fee = 0
        ;  W =< 53     -> Fee = 30
        ;  W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
        ;               fail                 /* >70 lb not accepted  */
        ).

/* ----------  Penalty = higher of oversize / overweight ------------ */
penalty(Id,comp,Pen) :-
        bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(Id,charged,Pen) :-
        bag(Id,L,W,H,Weight),
        dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
        oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
        overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),
        Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ----------  Base checked-bag fees for Business (U.S.–Europe) ----- */
/* 1st & 2nd bag free, 3rd bag $200, 4th+ $200                        */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(3,200).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N >= 4.

/* ----------  Choose which 2 bags receive the complimentary spots -- */
choose_two(List,B1,B2) :-
        append(_, [B1|Tail], List),
        member(B2, Tail).

ordered_list(B1,B2,Ordered) :-
        checked_bag_ids(All),
        select(B1,All,R1),
        select(B2,R1,R2),
        Ordered = [B1,B2|R2].   /* freebies occupy positions 1 & 2 */

cost_for_choice(B1,B2,Total) :-
        ordered_list(B1,B2,Ordered),

/* Walk through list, accumulating base fees and penalties            */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,CostSum,PenSum) :-
        (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),

/* ----------  Compute minimal total over all choices --------------- */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
        checked_bag_ids(L),

                    cost_for_choice(B1,B2,T)),

text: Emily is a Main Cabin Class passenger flying from Ottawa to Dallas with the following items: 1. A backpack: 19 x 14 x 9 inches, 6 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 46 x 27 x 21 inches, 52 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 41 x 26 x 16 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 38 x 17 x 9 inches, 55 lbs; 5. A backpack: 41 x 23 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; Emily's flight ticket is $291.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 1421"]).
/* =====================  Statutory rules ===================== */

/* carry-on limits */
carry_on_max(22,14,9).

/* checked-bag base fees for Main Cabin – between Canada and U.S. */
checked_fee(1, 35).      /* 1st checked bag               */
checked_fee(2, 45).      /* 2nd checked bag               */
checked_fee(3,150).      /* 3rd checked bag               */
checked_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.   /* 4th bag and beyond        */

/* over-size fees (within / between U.S. & Canada) */
oversize_fee(Dim,30)  :- Dim>62, Dim=<65.
oversize_fee(Dim,200) :- Dim>65, Dim=<115.
oversize_fee(Dim,0)   :- Dim=<62.

/* over-weight fees (charged bags – 50-lb base limit) */
overweight_fee(W,30)  :- W>50 , W=<53.
overweight_fee(W,100) :- W>53 , W=<70.
overweight_fee(W,200) :- W>70 , W=<100.
overweight_fee(W,0)   :- W=<50.

/* the single extra fee for a bag is the higher of the two */
extra_fee(Dim,W,Fee) :-
    oversize_fee(Dim,OS),
    overweight_fee(W,OW),
    (OS>=OW -> Fee=OS ; Fee=OW).


/* =====================  Trip facts (Emily) ===================== */

flight_ticket(291).
cabin(main_cabin).
route(canada_us).   /* Ottawa – Dallas */

/* bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight) */
bag(1,19,14, 9,  6).      /* backpack – will be the carry-on */
bag(2,46,27,21, 52).
bag(3,41,26,16, 52).
bag(4,38,17, 9, 55).
bag(5,41,23,14, 52).


/* =====================  Helper predicates ===================== */

/* sum of the three dimensions */
dim_sum(Id,Sum) :- bag(Id,L,W,H,_), Sum is L+W+H.

/* does the bag fit the carry-on template? */
carry_on(Id) :-
    bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
    carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
    L=<MaxL, W=<MaxW, H=<MaxH.

/* find the N-th checked bag (after removing the one carry-on) */
checked_bag_number(Id,N) :-
    findall(B,(bag(B,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(B)), Bs),
    nth1(N,Bs,Id).

/* total fee for one checked bag: base + extra (oversize / overweight) */
bag_total_fee(Id,Total) :-
    checked_bag_number(Id,N),
    checked_fee(N,Base),
    dim_sum(Id,Dim),
    bag(Id,_,_,_,W),
    extra_fee(Dim,W,Extra),
    Total is Base + Extra.

/* sum of all checked-bag fees */
total_checked_bag_fees(Sum) :-
    findall(F, bag_total_fee(_,F), Fs),
    sum_list(Fs,Sum).

/* grand total (ticket + all luggage charges) */
total_cost(Total) :-
    flight_ticket(Tix),
    total_checked_bag_fees(Bags),
    Total is Tix + Bags.


/* =====================  Query & output ===================== */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=4.   /* 4th and beyond             */

/* ======================  Cost engine  ====================== */

/* pick 2 different IDs (F1<F2) from a list */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* put the 2 freebies in positions 1-2, keep the rest in original order */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,R1),
       select(F2,R1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* total cost for one particular choice of freebies */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       bags_cost(Ordered,1,BagFees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Tix),
       Total is Tix + BagFees + Penalties.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating fees / penalties */
bags_cost([],_,0,0).
bags_cost([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeTot,PenTot) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BaseFee),
       penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
       Next is Idx+1,
       bags_cost(Bs,Next,RestFee,RestPen),
       FeeTot is BaseFee + RestFee,
       PenTot is Pen + RestPen.

/* compute minimal total cost over all ways of choosing the 2 freebies */
total_cost(Min) :-
       checked_bag_ids(L),
       findall(C,
               ( choose_two(L,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,C)),
               Costs),
       min_list(Costs,Min).

/* ======================  Query  ====================== */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

text: William is a First Class passenger flying from Hong Kong to Las Vegas with the following items: 1. A backpack: 20 x 11 x 8 inches, 8 lbs; 2. A backpack: 38 x 14 x 13 inches, 51 lbs; 3. A luggage box: 49 x 27 x 25 inches, 70 lbs; 4. A backpack: 45 x 30 x 22 inches, 83 lbs; 5. A backpack: 37 x 13 x 13 inches, 53 lbs; 6. A backpack: 47 x 28 x 22 inches, 56 lbs; 7. A backpack: 35 x 17 x 11 inches, 64 lbs; 8. A backpack: 33 x 20 x 12 inches, 53 lbs; William's flight ticket is $1413.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 3183"]).
/* ===================================================================
   Case:  William – First Class   Hong Kong  ➜  Las Vegas
   Goal:  compute total trip cost (ticket + all luggage charges)
   =================================================================== */

/* ----------------------  Trip-specific facts  ---------------------- */

/* published ticket price */
flight_cost(1413).

/* passenger’s pieces – bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight)            */
/* (bag #1 is his carry-on and is therefore NOT in the checked list)  */
bag(1,20,11, 8,  8).       /* carry-on, ignored for charges */
bag(2,38,14,13, 51).
bag(3,49,27,25, 70).
bag(4,45,30,22, 83).
bag(5,37,13,13, 53).
bag(6,47,28,22, 56).
bag(7,35,17,11, 64).
bag(8,33,20,12, 53).

/* Ids of the bags that must be checked */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ----------------------  Statutory parameters  --------------------- */

/* bag fees for this route (‘to / from … Hong Kong …’) – First Class   */
bag_fee(Idx,0)   :- Idx =< 3.           /* 1st–3rd bags complimentary  */
bag_fee(Idx,200) :- Idx >= 4.           /* 4th bag and beyond          */

/* size surcharge – Hong Kong / China region                           */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
          ( Sum =< 62          -> Fee = 0
          ; Sum =< 65          -> Fee = 30
          ; Sum =< 115         -> Fee = 200 ).

/* overweight surcharge – Hong Kong / China region                    */
/* ‘Thresh’ is 70 lb for a complimentary bag, 50 lb for a charged bag  */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
          ( W =< Thresh        -> Fee = 0
          ; W =< 53            -> Fee = 30
          ; W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
          ; W =< 100           -> Fee = 450 ).

/* penalty that applies to a bag: higher of over-size vs over-weight   */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
          bag(BagId,L,W,H,WT),
          Sum is L+W+H,
          oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
          overweight_fee(WT,70,OW),
          Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
          bag(BagId,L,W,H,WT),
          Sum is L+W+H,
          oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
          overweight_fee(WT,50,OW),
          Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* ----------------------  Helper predicates  ------------------------ */

/* choose three different elements (A < B < C) from a list            */
choose_three(List,A,B,C) :-
          append(_, [A|Tail1], List),
          append(_, [B|Tail2], Tail1),
          member(C, Tail2),
          A < B, B < C.

/* build ordered list: complimentary bags first, the rest afterwards  */
ordered_list(A,B,C,Ordered) :-
          checked_bag_ids(All),
          select(A,All,R1),
          select(B,R1,R2),
          select(C,R2,R3),
          Ordered = [A,B,C|R3].

/* ----------------------  Cost computation -------------------------- */

cost_for_choice(A,B,C,Total) :-
          ordered_list(A,B,C,Ord),
          cost_bags(Ord,1,BagCost,PenCost),
          flight_cost(Tix),
          Total is Tix + BagCost + PenCost.

/* walk through ordered list accumulating base fees and penalties      */
cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeTot,PenTot) :-
          (Idx =< 3 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
          bag_fee(Idx,Base),
          penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
          Next is Idx + 1,
          cost_bags(Bs,Next,FeeRest,PenRest),
          FeeTot is Base + FeeRest,
          PenTot is Pen + PenRest.

/* minimal total over all ways of selecting the 3 complimentary bags   */
total_cost(Min) :-
          checked_bag_ids(L),
          findall(T,
                  ( choose_three(L,A,B,C),
                    cost_for_choice(A,B,C,T) ),
                  Totals),
          min_list(Totals,Min).

/* ----------------------  Query & output  --------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

                  (choose_two(L,B1,B2), cost_for_choice(B1,B2,T)),
                  Totals),
          min_list(Totals,Min).

/* -------------  Produce the answer  --------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

text: Patricia is a Business Class passenger flying from Austin to Quito with the following items: 1. A backpack: 18 x 13 x 7 inches, 6 lbs; 2. A luggage box: 40 x 23 x 19 inches, 78 lbs; 3. A backpack: 36 x 14 x 13 inches, 52 lbs; 4. A luggage box: 38 x 15 x 12 inches, 61 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 50 x 34 x 25 inches, 77 lbs; 6. A backpack: 34 x 20 x 10 inches, 75 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 35 x 17 x 13 inches, 52 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 54 x 29 x 31 inches, 79 lbs; Patricia's flight ticket is $535.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2425"]).
/* =========================================================
   Patricia – Austin (U.S.)  →  Quito (Ecuador / S. America)
   Cabin: Business
   Itinerary region: Between U.S. and South America
   ========================================================= */

/* ----------------  Cost of the flight ticket  ------------ */
flight_cost(535).

/* ----------------  Bags brought on the trip -------------- */
/* Format: bag(Id,Length,Width,Height,Weight).               */
/* Bag 1 fits the carry-on limits and is therefore excluded  */
/* from the checked-bag calculations.                       */
bag(2,40,23,19,78).
bag(3,36,14,13,52).
bag(4,38,15,12,61).
bag(5,50,34,25,77).
bag(6,34,20,10,75).
bag(7,35,17,13,52).
bag(8,54,29,31,79).

/* All checked-bag Ids in a fixed order (smallest Id …)      */
checked_bag_ids([2,3,4,5,6,7,8]).

/* ---------------- Statutory Rules (region-specific) ------- */

/* Sum of the 3 outside dimensions of a bag */
dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

/* Oversize fees – Panama / South America (except Guyana / Suriname) */
oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (   Sum =< 62      -> Fee = 0
       ;   Sum =< 65      -> Fee = 30            % 62–65 in / 158–165 cm
       ;   Sum =< 115     -> Fee = 150 ).        % 65–115 in / 165–292 cm

/* Overweight fees (all regions except Cuba)                 */
/* Threshold 70 lbs for complimentary Business bags          */
/* Threshold 50 lbs for all charged bags                     */
overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (   W =< Thresh    -> Fee = 0
       ;   W =< 53        -> Fee = 30
       ;   W =< 70        -> Fee = 100
       ;   W =< 100       -> Fee = 200 ).

/* Penalty = higher of the two (oversize vs overweight)      */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
       oversize_fee(S,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,70,OW),        % 70-lb limit for complimentary bags
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Wt),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,S),
       oversize_fee(S,OS),
       overweight_fee(Wt,50,OW),        % 50-lb limit for charged bags
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

/* Checked-bag fees (Business class, U.S. ↔ South America)   */
bag_fee(1,0).
bag_fee(2,0).
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=3.

/* ---------------  Helper predicates  --------------------- */

/* Choose 2 different elements (F1 before F2) from a list    */
choose_two(List,F1,F2) :-
       append(_,[F1|Tail],List),
       member(F2,Tail).

/* Place the 2 free bags at positions 1 and 2                */
ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(F1,All,Rest1),
       select(F2,Rest1,Rest),
       Ordered = [F1,F2|Rest].

/* Cost produced by a particular choice of complimentary bags */
cost_for_choice(F1,F2,Total) :-
       ordered_list(F1,F2,Ordered),
       bags_cost(Ordered,1,BagsFee,Penalties),
       flight_cost(Tix),
       Total is Tix + BagsFee + Penalties.

/* Traverse ordered list, accumulating bag fees & penalties  */
bags_cost([],_,0,0).
bags_cost([Bag|Bs],Idx,FeeSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =< 2 -> Kind = comp ; Kind = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BFee),
       penalty(Bag,Kind,Pen),
       Next is Idx+1,
       bags_cost(Bs,Next,FRest,PRest),
       FeeSum is BFee + FRest,
       PenSum is Pen + PRest.

/* Overall minimal total cost (best choice of freebies)      */
total_cost(MinTotal) :-
       checked_bag_ids(Ids),
       findall(T,
               ( choose_two(Ids,F1,F2),
                 cost_for_choice(F1,F2,T)),
               Totals),
       min_list(Totals,MinTotal).

/* --------------------  Query  ----------------------------- */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n', [Total]).
:- halt.

/* overweight fee given the weight limit Thresh            */

overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-

        ;   W =< 70     -> Fee = 100
        ;   W =< 100    -> Fee = 200 ).

penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-

A luggage box: 33 x 20 x 10 inches, 61 lbs; 4. A backpack: 44 x 23 x 20 inches, 59 lbs; 5. A luggage box: 35 x 15 x 14 inches, 66 lbs; 6. A luggage box: 48 x 30 x 23 inches, 53 lbs; 7. A luggage box: 37 x 13 x 14 inches, 52 lbs; 8. A luggage box: 36 x 13 x 14 inches, 53 lbs; Jessica's flight ticket is $485.
question: What is the total cost (including the flight ticket fee, checked bag fees, cost of special needs) according to the policies for the passenger?
reference_prolog:
:- format("~w~n", ["Label: 2375"]).
/* =========================================================
   Jessica – Sydney (Australia)  ->  Seattle (U.S.A.)
   Main Cabin

   Goal:  Compute the minimum total trip cost (ticket +
          all checked-bag base fees + oversize / overweight
          penalties), applying American Airlines’ published
          bag-fee rules for travel to / from Australia.
   ========================================================= */


/* ------------  BASIC FACTS  -------------------------------- */

flight_cost(485).                  /* price of passenger ticket  */
cabin(main_cabin).

/*     bag(Id, Length, Width, Height, Weight)                   */
bag(1,20,11, 6,  7).      /* carry-on backpack                 */
bag(2,54,30,30, 63).
bag(3,33,20,10, 61).
bag(4,44,23,20, 59).
bag(5,35,15,14, 66).
bag(6,48,30,23, 53).
bag(7,37,13,14, 52).
bag(8,36,13,14, 53).


/* ------------  CARRY-ON LIMITS  ----------------------------- */

carry_on_max(22,14,9).

carry_on(Id) :-
       bag(Id,L,W,H,_),
       carry_on_max(MaxL,MaxW,MaxH),
       L =< MaxL, W =< MaxW, H =< MaxH.


/* ------------  CHECKED-BAG LIST  ---------------------------- */

checked_bag_ids(Ids) :-
       findall(Id,(bag(Id,_,_,_,_), \+ carry_on(Id)), Ids).



/* ------------  SIZE  /  WEIGHT HELPERS  -------------------- */

dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.



/* ------------  OVERSIZE FEES  (Australia <-> U.S.)  -------- */

oversize_fee(Sum,Fee) :-
       (  Sum =< 62           -> Fee = 0
       ;  Sum =< 65           -> Fee = 30
       ;  Sum =< 115          -> Fee = 200).



/* ------------  OVERWEIGHT FEES  (Australia <-> U.S.)  ------- */
/* Thresh = allowed weight (70 lb for complimentary, 50 lb charged) */

overweight_fee(W,Thresh,Fee) :-
       (  W =< Thresh         -> Fee = 0
       ;  W =< 53             -> Fee = 30
       ;  W =< 70             -> Fee = 100
       ;  W =< 100            -> Fee = 200 ).     % (>70 not accepted; never reached here)



/* ------------  PENALTY (oversize / overweight)  ------------- */

penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-        /* complimentary bag → 70-lb limit */
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,70,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-     /* charged bag → 50-lb limit       */
       bag(BagId,L,W,H,Weight),
       dims_sum(L,W,H,Sum),
       oversize_fee(Sum,OS),
       overweight_fee(Weight,50,OW),
       Pen is max(OS,OW).



/* ------------  BASE CHECKED-BAG FEES  (Main Cabin) ---------- */
/*   to / from Australia / New Zealand                          */

bag_fee(1,0).          /* 1st checked bag complimentary       */
bag_fee(2,100).        /* 2nd                                */
bag_fee(N,200) :- N>=3.



/* ------------  CHOOSING THE COMPLIMENTARY BAG  -------------- */

choose_free(Free,Rest) :-
       checked_bag_ids(All),
       select(Free,All,Rest).

ordered_list(Free,Ordered) :-
       choose_free(Free,Rest),
       Ordered = [Free|Rest].      /* free bag is placed first */



/* ------------  COST FOR A PARTICULAR ORDERING  -------------- */

cost_for_order(List,Total) :-
       cost_bags(List,1,BaseFees,Penalties),
       flight_cost(F),
       Total is F + BaseFees + Penalties.

cost_bags([],_,0,0).
cost_bags([Bag|Bs],Idx,BaseSum,PenSum) :-
       (Idx =:= 1 -> Type = comp ; Type = charged),
       bag_fee(Idx,BFee),
       penalty(Bag,Type,Pen),
       Next is Idx+1,
       cost_bags(Bs,Next,BaseRest,PenRest),
       BaseSum is BFee + BaseRest,
       PenSum  is Pen  + PenRest.



/* ------------  MINIMUM TOTAL COST  -------------------------- */

total_cost(MinCost) :-
       setof(Cost,
             Free^List^(ordered_list(Free,List), cost_for_order(List,Cost)),
             Costs),
       min_list(Costs,MinCost).



/* ------------  QUERY & OUTPUT  ------------------------------ */
:- total_cost(Total), format('Total cost: ~w~n',[Total]).
:- halt.

/* --------  Statutory parameters for this route / cabin ----------- */

dims_sum(L,W,H,S) :- S is L+W+H.

        (  Sum =< 62          -> Fee = 0

overweight_fee(W,Threshold,Fee) :-

        ;  W =< 70            -> Fee = 100
        ;  W =< 100           -> Fee = 200 ).

/* penalty = higher of oversize vs overweight ---------------------- */
penalty(BagId,comp,Pen) :-

penalty(BagId,charged,Pen) :-
